name: Cream Cheese Chocolate Cake
recipeIngredient: 4 ounces baking chocolate, melted and cooled to room temperature
recipeInstructions:
1. Sift together the cake flour, baking soda, and salt.
2. In a large mixing bowl, combine the cream cheese, 1/4 cup vegetable shortening, and vanilla extract. Beat until light and fluffy.
3. Add confectioners' sugar, hot water, and melted chocolate to the cream cheese mixture alternately, beating well after each addition. Blend until smooth.
4. Remove 2 cups of the chocolate mixture and cover with plastic wrap. Set aside for frosting.
5. Blend 1/4 cup vegetable shortening into the remaining chocolate mixture.
6. Add eggs one at a time, beating well after each addition.
7. Add dry ingredients alternately with 1/4 cup milk, beating well after each addition.
8. Spread batter evenly in two greased and waxed paper-lined 9-inch round cake pans.
9. Bake in a preheated oven set to 350°F for 35 minutes or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
10. Cool in the pans on wire racks for 10 minutes.
11. Remove cakes from pans and cool completely on racks.
12. Blend milk into the reserved chocolate mixture for frosting.
13. Place one layer on a serving plate and spread with frosting.
14. Top with second layer and frost sides, then top with remaining frosting.
